title: Hostess's stock shoots toward best day ever on report of Twinkies maker's possible sale

title: Canopy Growth sells Hershey Drive Facility for C$53M in pursuit of asset-light strategy
text: Canopy Growth Corporation (TSX:WEED, NYSE:CGC)'s Toronto-listed shares moved lower in pre-market trade on Thursday after the cannabis company announced it will be selling its Hershey Drive facility located in Smiths Falls, Ontario, to Hershey Canada for C$53 million. The sale is part of the company's strategy to move to a simplified, asset-light operating model with greater agility and less execution risk, the company noted.

title: Canopy Growth selling Smiths Falls facility to Hershey
text: Canopy Growth Corp.'s CGC, -0.39% U.S.-listed stock fell 1% after the company said it agreed to sell its Hershey Drive facility in Smiths Falls, Ontario to Hershey Co. HSY, -0.56% for C$53 million ($39.3 million). The company will still own its post-harvest manufacturing facility in Smiths Falls.
